title: Tangy Crusty Graham Cracker Ethiopian Crumb
description: A tangy and crisp meal-prep dish featuring graham cracker crumbs, perfect for an ethiopian-inspired snack.

ingredients.name: Graham Cracker
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are crisp and not too soft.

ingredients.name: Jalapeno Peppers
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for a spicy kick.

instructions: Chop the graham crackers into small pieces and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle jalapeno peppers over the crumbs evenly, then drizzle with Greek yogurt. Mix gently to coat all crumbs.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
